title: Nusuk Air Room Freshener Spray for Home, Car & Office, Long Lasting Fragrance 300 ML, Odor Eliminator, Deodorizer Spray For Room, Car & Wardrobe, Oud Al Shakhsiyat
features: Long-lasting Fragrance: Enjoy the delightful scent for an extended period, making every surface in the room smell amazing for hours.
Versatile Use: Use it in various settings including bedrooms, living rooms, workspaces, and public spaces to create a pleasant and inviting atmosphere.
OdourClear Technology: The OdourClear technology effectively traps malodorous particles in the air, eliminating unpleasant smells and leaving behind a refreshing fragrance.
Refreshing Scent: Nusuk Air Spray leaves behind a delightful and refreshing scent that revitalizes your surroundings, making it a welcoming environment for you and your guests.
Oud Al Shakhsiyat Notes: Top Note: Fresh Notes, Middle Note: Fruity and Sweet Notes, Base Note: White Musk
description: Description: Introducing Nusuk Air Spray, a room freshener designed to effortlessly enhance the ambiance of your living spaces. This convenient spray comes in a 300ml can and features a simple push and spray mechanism for easy use. With its long-lasting fragrance, it ensures that every surface in your room smells amazing for an extended period. Whether it's your bedroom, living room, workspace, or public spaces, Nusuk Air Spray is versatile and suitable for use anywhere. Features: Convenient to Use: The easy push and spray mechanism are designed for maximum convenience, allowing you to quickly refresh your space with a simple action. Long-lasting Fragrance: Enjoy the delightful scent for an extended period, making every surface in the room smell amazing for hours. Versatile Use: Use it in various settings including bedrooms, living rooms, workspaces, and public spaces to create a pleasant and inviting atmosphere. OdourClear Technology: The OdourClear technology effectively traps malodorous particles in the air, eliminating unpleasant smells and leaving behind a refreshing fragrance. Refreshing Scent: Air Spray leaves behind a delightful and refreshing scent that revitalizes your surroundings, making it a welcoming environment for you and your guests. Specifications: Product Name: Nusuk Air Spray - Room Freshener Volume: 300ml Mechanism: Push and spray Fragrance Type: Long-lasting and refreshing Use: Suitable for bedrooms, living rooms, workspaces Technology: Patented OdourClear technology Application: Ideal for eliminating odours and refreshing the air
